title: 60-Second 2 a.m. Reset: 3 Scriptures
hook: Awake at 2 a.m.? Do this 60-second reset.
script: Awake at 2 a.m.? Do this 60-second reset. First, breathe in: The Lord is my shepherd. Breathe out: I lack nothing. Psalm 23:1. Now place the fear in God’s hands. Breathe in: I present my requests to You. Breathe out: Your peace guards my heart. Philippians 4:6-7. Last round. Breathe in: Do not fear, I am with you. Breathe out: You strengthen and uphold me. Isaiah 41:10. Here’s the reframe: Nighttime thoughts are loud, but not always true. God’s promises are louder and always true. Jesus, quiet my mind, slow my body, and surround me with Your peace. Amen.

title: 3 Night Verses to Stop the Spiral
hook: If you're feeling anxious, watch this before you spiral.
script: If you're feeling anxious, watch this before you spiral. Verse one: In peace I will lie down and sleep, for You alone, Lord, make me dwell in safety. Psalm 4:8. Verse two: Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you. 1 Peter 5:7. Picture handing Him one worry at a time. Verse three: Do not worry about tomorrow; today has enough trouble. Matthew 6:34. Reframe: Night magnifies what morning will shrink. God is already in tomorrow. Prayer: Lord, carry what I can’t, calm what I can’t control, and give me rest while You work. Amen.

title: Breath-Prayer for 2 a.m. Panic
hook: If God feels silent at 2 a.m., listen to this 60-second reset.
script: If God feels silent at 2 a.m., listen to this 60-second reset. When I am afraid, I put my trust in You. Psalm 56:3. Whisper it with your breath. In: I trust You. Out: I release control. Peace I leave with you; My peace I give you. John 14:27. In: Your peace is here. Out: Not as the world gives. The mind governed by the Spirit is life and peace. Romans 8:6. In: Spirit, lead my thoughts. Out: Give me life and peace. Reframe: My body is alarmed, but I am not abandoned. Jesus, sit with me in this night and settle my soul. Amen.
